mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT U.USER_NO, U.USER_ID, U.JIKWEE, U.JIKGUK, U.BOSS_NAME, U.USER_GRADE, U.USER_NAME, U.INSA_CODE, G.TEAM_NAME, U.REGDATE, IFNULL(PASSWORD, 'X') AS PASSWORD_CHECK, CASE WHEN U.PASSWORD = SHA2(HEX(#{password}),256) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PASSWORD, U.USER_GRADE, GU.GRADE_NAME, REPLACE(IFNULL(U.ACCESS_IP, ''), ' ', '') AS ACCESS_IP, '' AS OFFICE_NM, U.SECRET_KEY AS SECRET_KEY, U.ENDDATE,
U.STARTDATE, U.FAILED_COUNT, if(NOW() > LOCK_DATE, 'N', 'Y') LOCK_ACCOUNT, CASE WHEN U.PWD_UPT_DT < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -90 DAY) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS PWD_EXPIRE, U.USER_PHONE AS USER_PHONE, U.SOSOK, U.USER_PHONE, U.USER_EMAIL, PWD_RESET_STATUS, U.LOGINDATE, U.LOCK_STATUS, IF(LP.`ENABLE` = 1, (CASE WHEN LP.UPDATE_PWD_CHK = 1 AND U.PWD_UPT_DT < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -LP.UPDATE_PWD DAY) AND U.USER_NO != 'frentree' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END),'N') AS CHANGE_CHK, IF(LP.`ENABLE` = 1, (CASE WHEN LP.USE_ID_LOCK_CHK = 1 AND U.LOGINDATE < DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL -LP.USE_ID_LOCK DAY) AND U.USER_NO != 'frentree' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END),'N') AS USE_CHK FROM PI_USER U, PI_GROUP G, PI_GRADE_USER GU, pi_login_policy LP WHERE U.INSA_CODE = G.INSA_CODE AND U.USER_GRADE = GU.GRADE_NO AND (U.USER_NO = #{user_no} OR U.USER_ID = #{user_no})
